title: CMS IndusLaw's Shashwat Kumar joins Jindal Steel as VP Legal
description: CMS IndusLaw Partner Shashwat Kumar has joined Jindal Steel Limited as Vice President (Legal).Kumar is an alumnus of Faculty of Law University of Delhi.With nearly two decades of experience, Kumar specialises in infrastructure and Indian regulatory laws. He has been associated with multiple leading law firms which include JSA, AZB & Partners, Link Legal, SAM, and most recently, CMS INDUSLAW, where he served as a Partner for over two years.Kumar's move to Jindal Steel marks his first stint as
